info.name: Microsoft Azure SynapseSqlV3ManagementClient
info.description: The Azure Synapse SQL management API provides a RESTful set of web APIs that interact with Azure Synapse SQL services to manage your resources. The API enables users to create, retrieve, update, and delete SqlPools, SqlDatabases, and other entities.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Synapse Workspaces Workspacename Sqlpools Sqlpoolname Pause

response.name: Pausing the SqlPool is in progress.
The specified SqlPool does not exist.
response

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Synapse Workspaces Workspacename Sqlpools Sqlpoolname Resume

response.name: Resuming the SqlPool is in progress.
The specified SqlPool does not exist.
response

response.name: response

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Synapse Workspaces Workspacename Sqlpools Sqlpoolname

request.description: Creates a new SqlPool or updates an existing SqlPool.

response.name: Creating or updating the SqlPool is in progress.
response

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Synapse Workspaces Workspacename Sqlpools Sqlpoolname
